headline: World Cup
body: West Ham United can confirm that Tomáš Souček will undergo further assessment on the ankle injury he sustained at the World Cup finals last week. Everyone at West Ham United would like to wish Tomáš a speedy recovery. Further updates will be shared in due course. Link Read more whufc.com
raw_text:
West Ham United can confirm that Tomáš Souček will undergo further assessment on the ankle injury he sustained at the World Cup finals last week.

Everyone at West Ham United would like to wish Tomáš a speedy recovery. Further updates will be shared in due course.

Link
